item.title: Omodo v1.6
item.description:
• Retry failed or regenerate completed meeting summaries — no more lost recordings
  • Meeting History in Settings > Meeting shows all past recordings with status at a glance
  • Activity Log for meeting tasks links directly to the audio file and offers a one-click reprocess

item.title: Omodo v1.7
item.description:
• Smart clipboard: app-aware tab that surfaces items you've copied from or pasted into the current app
  • Tabbed clipboard panel with Smart, Recent, and Pinned views
  • Arrow key and Tab/Shift-Tab keyboard shortcuts for cycling clipboard tabs
  • Re-copied clipboard items now reflect the latest source app and timestamp
  • Dock right-click menu now lists all open windows for quick access
  • Ollama custom endpoint and selected models now persist reliably across app restarts

item.title: Omodo v1.8
item.description:
• Download and manage AI models directly from the app, in addition to the Ollama option
  • Smarter duplicate detection: similar emails about the same task no longer create duplicate reminders
  • One-click contact sync keeps contact details, items, and notes up to date
  • Completing or dismissing a task now automatically resolves related duplicates
  • Choose between light, dark, or system theme in Settings
  • Screen recording permission in Settings now reflects changes instantly — no app restart needed
  • Send Feedback added to the menu bar

item.title: Omodo v1.9
item.description:
• Multi-Mac Sync: sync contacts, memories, skill settings, and processing history across Macs via a shared iCloud Drive folder
  • Choose any iCloud Drive folder for sync data — visible in Finder, accessible from all your Macs
  • Contact deletions now propagate across devices automatically
  • Meeting start reminders: get a notification before calendar events with tracked contacts, with a one-tap Start Recording button
  • Auto-stop idle recordings: meetings automatically stop when both audio sources go silent and no active calendar event is detected

item.title: Omodo v2.0
item.description:
• Scanned PDF support: image-based PDFs are now rendered page-by-page and processed through the vision model, so scanned receipts and invoices are no longer silently skipped
  • Upgraded built-in vision models: Qwen3 VL 4B/8B replace Qwen2.5 VL, with significantly better OCR and document understanding
  • New DeepSeek OCR-2 model option: lightweight 1B OCR specialist for fast receipt and document text extraction
  • Backup & restore: create full snapshots of all app data and settings, and restore from a previous backup with one click
  • Transcribe audio files on disk in addition to live meeting recordings
  • EventKit events cache reduces redundant fetches when switching between contacts
  • Removed Prompts settings tab — custom prompts are now managed via the Data tab
  • Vision model migration: users on old Qwen2.5 VL models are automatically switched to the best available Qwen3 VL model

item.title: Omodo v2.1
item.description:
• Reprocess button: reprocess any file directly from the Activity detail view with a single click
  • Subfolder context: auto-sort now uses LLM-generated subfolder descriptions for smarter file organization
  • Retroactive sort: when new subfolders are created, existing root-level files are automatically reconsidered for sorting
  • iCloud file auto-download: monitored folders on iCloud Drive now trigger downloads for evicted files so they can be processed
  • Receipt extraction accuracy: line item totals are validated against the subtotal, with a warning when items are missing
  • Reindex rebuilt from scratch: "Reindex All Files" now deletes all records and rediscovers files cleanly, eliminating duplicate entries
  • Duplicate file prevention: auto-sort file moves are now persisted immediately, and duplicate task enqueues are blocked
  • Removed unsupported DeepSeek OCR-2 from the built-in model catalog
  • On-demand model loading: AI models load only when needed and unload after idle, freeing up to 5 GB of RAM
  • New "Keep models loaded" option in Settings for users who prefer instant AI responses
  • GPU memory safety: checks available memory before AI processing, skips gracefully if insufficient
  • Vision model reasoning text no longer leaks into file summaries
  • Scanned PDF rendering optimized for smaller, faster vision processing

item.title: Omodo v2.2
item.description:
• Faster AI responses: built-in models now cache conversation context, so follow-up messages and multi-turn chats respond significantly faster
  • Smarter PDF processing: scanned documents render at higher quality with 2x scale, improving OCR and receipt extraction accuracy
  • Larger image support: vision processing now handles images up to 8MB, so high-resolution scans and photos are no longer skipped
  • Browse subfolders in Files: new subfolder dropdown lets you filter files by subfolder within a monitored folder
  • Auto-select working model: if your selected AI model is missing or incomplete, the app automatically switches to the best available one
  • Download integrity check: incomplete model downloads from interrupted sessions are detected and cleaned up on startup
  • Fixed chat responses occasionally appearing in the wrong conversation
  • Fixed meeting auto-stop triggering during an active conversation when only one audio source paused briefly

item.title: Omodo v2.3
item.description:
• Smart auto-complete: active reminders are now automatically completed when email context confirms the task is done
  • Redesigned receipt view: vendor info and line items are now separate sections for clearer organization
  • Inline line item editing: double-click any line item name to edit it directly in the table
  • Fixed Ollama vision model getting deselected after every app restart

item.title: Omodo v2.4
item.description:
• Redesigned live meeting notes: event-driven updates appear faster with timestamps between sections, and notes accumulate across the entire meeting instead of being replaced
  • LLM warmup: meeting recordings preload the AI model so first notes generate sooner
  • iCloud sync now works for images: processed image metadata syncs between Macs (existing images are backfilled automatically)
  • Skill toggles now sync correctly on app update — features like live meeting notes and file renaming no longer need to be toggled off/on after updating
  • Activity timestamps now show the date alongside time for easier identification
  • Rule generation has a 30-second timeout with automatic fallback to a template rule
  • Clearer activity messages when extracted actions are skipped due to duplicate detection

item.title: Omodo v2.5
item.description:
• Mobile companion: chat with Omodo from your iPhone over local Wi-Fi — uses the same AI tools as the desktop app (reminders, calendar, contacts, files)
  • Recording indicator: a floating widget near the notch shows recording status with timer, and expands on hover for quick stop/pause controls
  • Gemma 4 E2B: new ultra-fast built-in model option for quick queries on 8GB devices
  • Fixed crashes caused by MLX KV cache (now disabled with automatic migration for existing users)
  • Fixed wrong model being used when switching LLM backends while a task is queued
  • Fixed memory not being released when switching from built-in to Ollama backend
  • Live meeting notes engine rewritten for reliability — no longer crashes mid-recording

item.title: Omodo v2.5.1
item.description: • Fixed app hanging on launch when iCloud Drive file provider holds a lock
